sections.premium-external-linkage: Romance of the Three Kingdoms XI: Secret Characters Information on Dong Bai in Three Kingdoms XI.
sections.biography-collaborative-works:
Dong Bai is a fictional character who has appeared in Koei’s Romance of the Three Kingdoms XI and the card game, Sangokushi Taisen (三国志大戦).

“Dong Zhuo’s granddaughter. When Dong Zhuo was assassinated, all of his relatives, young and old alike, were murdered. When Dong Zhuo held political power and his whole family was being given high government positions, Dong Bai was given territory as the Wei Yang Lord before she reached the age of fifteen. After the seal presentation, chief retainers such as commanders, intendants and governors became her advisors. After Dong Zhuo’s death, his mother, father, wife, children and siblings were all wiped out.” (1)

1: Source: Romance of the Three Kingdoms XI

full_text:
Dong Bai 董白
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Bai (董白). Granddaughter of Dong Zhuo. Made a Lord even before she came of age. Dong Bai was affiliated with Dong Zhuo. Dong Bai lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
